message.content:
@startuml title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--删除用户用例的顺序图 actor sysAdmin #LightBlue2 participant "边界类\nmaintainUsersWindow" as maintainUsersWindow #LightPurple3 { circle } control "控制类\nMaintainUsers" as MaintainUsers #Pink1 { arrowhead = triangle; shape=triangle;} entity users #LavenderBlush4{circle} database "数据库存储" as dbStorage #Azure5 sysAdmin ->> maintainUsersWindow : 删除用户 activate maintainUsersWindow activate maintainUsersWindow maintainUsersWindow->>+MaintainUsers: 删除用户请求 MaintainUsers-->+users:确认删除的用户信息 users --> +dbStorage:数据库存储实验数据 return deactivate dbStorage return 根据系统管理员删除的
用户信息返回数据 deactivate users note over sysAdmin,maintainUsersWindow:退出流程:\n<#DarkGreen>-点击关闭按钮或选择菜单项“文件”→ “退出”。\n-系统将保存当前状态并关闭窗口。 destroy maintainUsersWindow @enduml
